error_signature: cannot get audio file after adding chat action
title: Unable to retrieve audio file after adding chat action
symptom: After adding a chat action in Telegram, the audio file cannot be retrieved, resulting in errors when trying to access binary data.
applies_when: Adding a chat action before processing the audio file
not_this_if: Audio file is retrieved successfully without chat action
Using a different node for audio processing
root_cause: When a chat action is added to the workflow, the binary data may not be properly passed through to subsequent nodes, leading to issues in accessing the audio file.
fix_steps: Add a Merge node after the Telegram node to combine the audio file with the chat action.
Ensure that the binary data from the Telegram node is merged correctly before passing it to the Upload File node.
agent_instruction: Use a Merge node to combine the audio file with the chat action in your workflow.
